blocks.headline: Websites, made simple.
blocks.subheadline: Fast, beautiful sites built by hand for small businesses, creatives, and anyone with an idea worth shipping.

blocks.tagline: A branding studio with sixteen years of work across food, lifestyle, and consumer brands.
Family-run Mexican food since 1990 — restaurants, catering, retail salsa, and recipes that go back generations.
End-of-life planning for families who want their paperwork in order before anything goes wrong.

items.title: Clean and simple
items.description: No clutter, no bloat. Every site is stripped down to what matters — clear design, modern aesthetics, and an experience that just works.

items.title: Continuous support
items.description: Your site isn’t done when it launches. I stick around to iterate, tweak, and improve based on what’s working.

items.title: Quick and fast
items.description: Performance comes first. Every site loads fast, runs smooth, and scores well where it counts.
